debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
G : Graph α β
h : (x : α) → @Graph.inessential α β G x
⊢ ∃ M, @Graph.IsMatching α β G M ∧ ∀ (H : Graph α β), H.IsCompOf G → ∃! x, x ∈ H.vertexSet ∧ x ∉ V(G, M)

failed_attempts:
by_cases hG : V(G).Nonempty
  · obtain ⟨M, hM, _⟩ := h hG.some
    refine ⟨M, hM.toIsMatching, fun H hH ↦ ?_⟩
    have : {x | x ∈ V(H) ∧ x ∉ V(G, M)}.encard = 1 := sorry
    rwa [encard_eq_one_iff_existsUnique] at this
  · refine ⟨∅, ⟨by simp, by simp⟩, fun H hH ↦ ?_⟩
    exact (hG ⟨hH.nonempty.some, hH.subset_vertexSet hH.nonempty.some_mem⟩).elim

obtain ⟨M, hM⟩ : ∃ M, G.IsMaxMatching M := by
    if hV : ∃ x, x ∈ V(G) then exact (h hV.choose).imp (fun _ ↦ And.left)
    else exact ⟨∅, ⟨by simp [E], by simp, fun M' hM' ↦ by
      have : M' = ∅ := Set.subset_empty_iff.mp (fun e he ↦ (let ⟨x, hx⟩ := G.edge_nonempty (hM'.subset he); hV ⟨x, G.subset_V _ (hM'.subset he) hx⟩))
      simp [this]⟩⟩
  refine ⟨M.toIsMatching, fun H hH ↦ ?_⟩
  let L := G.matchingMatroid
  have h_series : ∀ a ∈ V(H), ∀ b ∈ V(H), a ≠ b → L.Series a b := by
    intro a ha b hb hab
    obtain ⟨P, hP⟩ := hH.connected a ha b hb
    exact hP.series_of_adj (fun u v h_adj ↦ matchingMatroid.seriesPair_of_adj h h_adj)
  have h_rk : L.eRk V(H) = V(H).encard - 1 := by
    obtain rfl | hnt := V(H).subsingleton_or_nontrivial
    · have : L.eRk V(H) = 0 := by
        rw [Matroid.eRk_le_zero_iff, subset_empty_iff]
        intro x hx; obtain ⟨M', hM', hxM'⟩ := h x
        have : x ∈ L.E := hH.subset_V hx
        exact (matchingMatroid.noColoop h this).not_loop (L.loop_iff_not_mem_indep.mpr (fun hi ↦ hxM' hi.subset_V_matching))
      simp [this, encard_subsingleton hH.nonempty.subsingleton]
    have h_rk_eq := _root_.Matroid.fooA hH.subset_V hnt h_series
    have h_sum : L.eRank = L.eRk V(H) + L.eRk (L.E \ V(H)) := L.eRk_add_eRk_compl_of_isComp hH.isCompOf_matroid
    rw [h_sum, add_assoc, add_left_inj] at h_rk_eq; rw [← h_rk_eq, add_comm, ENat.add_sub_cancel (by simp)]
  have h_card : (V(H) \ V(G, M)).encard = 1 := by
    rw [encard_diff_left_of_subset (L.basis_inter_V_H hM hH), h_rk, ENat.sub_self_of_le (by simp)]
  rwa [encard_eq_one_iff_exists_unique] at h_card

obtain ⟨x⟩ | hα := isEmpty_or_nonempty α
  · obtain ⟨M, hM, _⟩ := h x
    refine ⟨M, hM.toIsMatching, fun H hH ↦ ?_⟩
    have h_none : (V(H) \ V(G, M)).Nonempty := hH.exists_not_mem_of_inessential h hM
    have h_sub : (V(H) \ V(G, M)).Subsingleton := fun y hy z hz ↦ by_contra fun hne ↦ by
      obtain ⟨P, hP⟩ := hH.exists_isAugPath hM hy hz hne
      exact (hM.max _ hP.augment).not_lt hP.augment_encard
    exact (encard_eq_one_iff_exists_unique _).1 (h_none.encard_eq_one_of_subsingleton h_sub)
  · exact ⟨∅, (isMatching_iff _ _).2 ⟨by simp, by simp⟩, by simp [hα.forall_iff]⟩

obtain ⟨B, hB⟩ := G.matchingMatroid.exists_basis
  obtain ⟨M, hM, hBM⟩ := hB.indep
  have hB_eq : V(G, M) = B := hB.eq_of_subset ⟨M, hM, fun v hv ↦ hv⟩ hBM
  refine ⟨M, hM, fun H hH ↦ ?_⟩
  rwa [hB_eq]
  sorry

obtain ⟨x⟩ | hG := isEmpty_or_nonempty α
  · obtain ⟨M, hM, -⟩ := h x
    refine ⟨M, hM.toIsMatching, fun H hH ↦ ?_⟩
    have h_ser : (V(H)).Pairwise G.matchingMatroid.Series := 
      fun u hu v hv _ ↦ hH.connected.induction_on hu hv (fun _ _ a ↦ matchingMatroid.seriesPair_of_adj h (hH.adj_of_adj a))
    have h_enc : (V(H) \ V(G, M)).encard = 1 := by
      simpa [G.matchingMatroid.IsBasis.encard (M := G.matchingMatroid) (by sorry)] 
        using G.matchingMatroid.fooA (by sorry) (by sorry) h_ser
    rwa [← encard_eq_one_iff_exists_unique]
  · refine ⟨∅, ⟨by sorry, by sorry⟩, fun H hH ↦ (hG.elim hH.nonempty.some)⟩

obtain ⟨M, hM⟩ : ∃ M, G.IsMaxMatching M := by
    if hV : Nonempty α then (let ⟨x⟩ := hV; let ⟨M, hM, _⟩ := h x; exact ⟨M, hM⟩)
    else exact ⟨∅, ⟨⟨fun e he ↦ (hV ⟨G.V_mem_of_E_mem he⟩).elim, fun e f he ↦ (hV ⟨G.V_mem_of_E_mem he⟩).elim⟩,
      fun M' hM' ↦ by { rw [encard_empty]; exact zero_le _ }⟩⟩
  refine ⟨M.toIsMatching, fun H hH ↦ ?_⟩
  rw [← encard_eq_one_iff_exists_unique]
  have h_rk : (V(H) ∩ V(G, M)).encard = V(H).encard - 1 := by
    have h_ser : ∀ x y ∈ V(H), G.matchingMatroid.Series x y :=
      fun x y hx hy ↦ hH.series_of_adj_connected (matchingMatroid.seriesPair_of_adj h) hx hy
    have h_nc : ∀ x ∈ V(H), ¬ G.matchingMatroid.IsColoop x :=
      fun x hx ↦ matchingMatroid.noColoop h (hH.subset_ground hx)
    have h_comp : G.matchingMatroid.IsComponent V(H) := hH.isMatroidComponent
    rw [← G.matchingMatroid.eRk_basis_inter_vcomp hM.isBasis_vertexSet h_comp]
    exact hH.eRk_vertexSet_of_series_noColoop h_ser h_nc
  rwa [← encard_diff_eq_one_of_inter_encard_eq_sub_one h_rk]

obtain ⟨M, hM⟩ : ∃ M, G.IsMaxMatching M := by
    rcases isEmpty_or_nonempty α with hα | ⟨x⟩
    · use ∅; refine ⟨⟨by simp, by simp⟩, fun M' hM' ↦ by haveI := hα; simp [M'.encard_zero_of_isEmpty]⟩
    · obtain ⟨M, hM, -⟩ := h x; exact ⟨M, hM⟩
  exact ⟨M, hM.toIsMatching, fun H hH ↦ by
    have h_series : ∀ {x y}, x ∈ V(H) → y ∈ V(H) → x ≠ y → G.matchingMatroid.Series x y :=
      fun hx hy hxy ↦ hH.isConnected.joined hx hy |>.series_of_adj (fun _ _ ↦ matchingMatroid.seriesPair_of_adj h)
    sorry⟩

obtain ⟨M, hM⟩ : ∃ M, G.IsMaxMatching M := by
    if hα : Nonempty α then exact (h hα.some).imp (fun _ h ↦ h.1)
    else refine ⟨∅, ⟨by simp [E], by simp, fun M' hM' ↦ by
      have : M' = ∅ := by { ext e; exact (hα ⟨G.inc_left (hM'.subset (by assumption))⟩).elim }; simp [this]⟩⟩
  refine ⟨M, hM.toIsMatching, fun H hH ↦ ?_⟩
  have hH_rk : G.matchingMatroid.eRk V(H) = V(H).encard - 1 := by
    obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ | hH_empty := H.vertexSet.exists_nonempty_or_empty
    · have h_series : ∀ a ∈ V(H), ∀ b ∈ V(H), a ≠ b → G.matchingMatroid.Series a b :=
        fun a ha b hb hne ↦ (hH.connected.4 a ha b hb).series_of_adj (fun u _ v _ hadj ↦ G.matchingMatroid.seriesPair_of_adj h hadj) hne
      obtain hH_nt | hH_sub := H.vertexSet.nontrivial_or_subsingleton
      · have := G.matchingMatroid.fooA (H.vertexSet_subset_ground) hH_nt h_series
        have h_rk_sum : G.matchingMatroid.eRank = G.matchingMatroid.eRk (V(G) \ V(H)) + G.matchingMatroid.eRk V(H) := sorry
        rw [h_rk_sum, ← this, add_right_comm, add_comm (V(H).encard), add_left_inj] at h_rk_sum
        sorry
      · have : V(H) = {x} := hH_sub.eq_singleton_of_mem hx
        simp [this, matchingMatroid]
        sorry
    · exfalso; exact hH.nonempty.1 hH_empty
  have h_unmatched : (V(H) \ V(G, M)).encard = 1 := by
    rw [← hH_rk, encard_diff_eq_sub_encard, enat.sub_self_le_one] <;> sorry
  exact existsUnique_iff_encard_eq_one.mpr h_unmatched

by_cases hG : (V(G)).Nonempty
  · obtain ⟨M, hM, -⟩ := h hG.some
    refine ⟨M, hM.toIsMatching, fun H hH ↦ ?_⟩
    have h_miss : (H.vertexSet \ V(G, M)).encard = 1 := by
      have h_series : ∀ x ∈ H.vertexSet, ∀ y ∈ H.vertexSet, x ≠ y → G.matchingMatroid.Series x y :=
        fun x hx y hy hne ↦ (hH.connected hx hy).series (fun u v hadj ↦ matchingMatroid.seriesPair_of_adj h hadj)
      sorry
    exact encard_eq_one_iff.mp h_miss
  · refine ⟨∅, ⟨by intro e he; exact (hG ⟨G.v_left e, G.v_left_mem he⟩).elim, by simp⟩, ?_⟩
    intro H hH; exact (hG (hH.vertexSet.Nonempty.mono hH.subset_ground)).elim

obtain ⟨M, hM, -⟩ : ∃ M, G.IsMaxMatching M ∧ (∀ x, x ∉ V(G) → x ∉ V(G, M)) := by
    by_cases hne : (V(G) : Set α).Nonempty
    · obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := hne; obtain ⟨M, hM, hxM⟩ := h x; exact ⟨M, hM, fun x hxG hxM ↦ hxG (hM.subset (V_subset_E hxM) |>.1)⟩
    · use ∅; refine ⟨⟨⟨by simp [E, hne], by simp⟩, fun M' hM' ↦ by
        have : M' = ∅ := by rw [subset_empty_iff]; intro e he; exact (Set.not_mem_empty _ (hM'.subset he).1); simp [this]⟩, by simp⟩
  use M, hM.toIsMatching, fun H hH ↦ by
    have hH_iness : ∀ x ∈ V(H), H.inessential x := fun x hx ↦ by
      obtain ⟨M', hM', hxM'⟩ := h x
      exact ⟨M' ∩ E(H), hM'.toIsMatching.sub (by simp) |>.isMaxMatching_of_vertex_subset (by sorry), by sorry⟩
    have h_card : (V(H) \ V(G, M)).encard = 1 := by
      rw [MatchingNumber, hM.encard] at *
      sorry
    rwa [Set.encard_eq_one_iff_existsUnique] at h_card

obtain ⟨M, hM, _⟩ := h (Classical.arbitrary α)
  refine ⟨M, hM.toIsMatching, fun H hH ↦ ?_⟩
  have hS : (V(H) \ V(G, M)).encard = 1 := by
    have h_series : ∀ a ∈ V(H), ∀ b ∈ V(H), a ≠ b → G.matchingMatroid.Series a b := 
      fun a ha b hb hab ↦ hH.series_of_adj (matchingMatroid.seriesPair_of_adj h) a ha b hb hab
    have h_foo := _root_.Matroid.fooA (M := G.matchingMatroid) hH.subset_ground hH.nontrivial h_series
    have h_dual_rk : G.matchingMatroid.dual.eRk V(H) = 1 := by
      rw [Matroid.eRk_dual_add_eRank _ hH.subset_ground, h_foo]; simp
    rw [← h_dual_rk, hH.isBasis_inter_encard hM.isBasis_matchingMatroid.dual_isBasis_compl]
  exact (Set.encard_eq_one_iff_exists_unique _).mp hS

obtain ⟨M, hM, _⟩ := (Classical.exists_or_forall_not (fun x ↦ x ∈ V(G))).match
    (fun hG ↦ h hG.choose)
    (fun hG ↦ ⟨∅, ⟨⟨fun e he ↦ (hG _ (G.inc_left he)).elim, fun e f he _ _ ↦ (hG _ (G.inc_left he)).elim⟩,
    fun M' hM' ↦ by simpa [hG, encard_empty] using (Set.eq_empty_iff_forall_not_mem.mpr fun e he ↦ hG _ (G.inc_left (hM'.subset he)))⟩, True.intro⟩)
  refine ⟨M, hM.toIsMatching, fun H hH ↦ ?_⟩
  have hS : (V(H) \ V(G, M)).encard = 1 := by
    have h_series : ∀ a ∈ V(H), ∀ b ∈ V(H), a ≠ b → G.matchingMatroid.Series a b := by
      intro a ha b hb hne
      obtain ⟨P, hP⟩ := hH.connected ha hb
      exact hP.series (fun u v adj ↦ matchingMatroid.seriesPair_of_adj h adj)
    have h_rk := Matroid.fooA hH.subset_vertexSet hH.vertexSet_nonempty h_series
    have h_basis : G.matchingMatroid.IsBasis V(G, M) := by
      rw [matchingMatroid, isMaxMatching_iff] at hM
      exact ⟨⟨M, hM.1, (subset_refl _)⟩, fun S ⟨M', hM', hS⟩ hsub ↦ by
        rw [encard_le_encard_iff_left hsub, ← mul_le_mul_left (show 0 < 2 by norm_num),
          ← hM', ← hM.1] at hsub
        simpa [hM.2 M' hM'] using hsub⟩
    have h_basis_H := h_basis.inter_isBasis_of_isCompOf hH
    rw [← h_rk, ← h_basis_H.encard, ← hH.subset_vertexSet.encard_diff,
      diff_inter_self_eq_diff, Matroid.eRk_def, h_basis_H.encard]
    exact (add_right_inj (G.matchingMatroid.eRk V(H))).mp (by rw [h_rk, add_comm])
  exact encard_eq_one_iff_exists_unique.mp hS

have : ∃ M, G.IsMaxMatching M := by
    rcases Classical.em (Nonempty α) with ⟨⟨x⟩⟩ | hα
    · obtain ⟨M, hM, -⟩ := h x; exact ⟨M, hM⟩
    · refine ⟨∅, ⟨⟨by simp, fun e f h ↦ h.elim⟩, fun M' h' ↦ ?_⟩⟩
      rw [encard_eq_zero.2 (Set.eq_empty_of_subset_empty (h'.subset.trans (by simpa using hα)))]; simp
  obtain ⟨M, hM⟩ := this
  refine ⟨M, hM.toIsMatching, fun H hH ↦ ?_⟩
  have h1 := matchingMatroid.noColoop h
  have h2 := @matchingMatroid.seriesPair_of_adj _ _ G h
  have h_rank : (V(H) \ V(G, M)).encard = 1 := by
    sorry
  rwa [encard_eq_one_iff_exists_unique] at h_rank

obtain ⟨M, hM⟩ : ∃ M, G.IsMaxMatching M := by
    obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ | hV := (V(G) : Set α).exists_mem_or_forall_not_mem
    · exact (h x).exists
    · exact ⟨∅, { subset := by intro e he; exact (hV _ (G.edge_subset_ground he)).elim,
                  disjoint := by simp, max := by sorry }⟩
  refine ⟨hM.toIsMatching, fun H hH ↦ ?_⟩
  rw [← encard_eq_one_iff_exists_unique]
  sorry

obtain ⟨B, hB⟩ := G.matchingMatroid.exists_isBasis
  obtain ⟨M, hM, hMB⟩ := hB.indep
  use M, hM
  intro H hH
  have hB_eq : B = V(G, M) := hB.indep_maximal ⟨M, hM, subset_refl _⟩ hMB
  rw [← hB_eq, ← encard_eq_one_iff_exists_unique]
  exact G.matchingMatroid.encard_diff_comp_eq_one hH h

classical
  obtain ⟨M, hM⟩ : ∃ M, G.IsMaxMatching M := by
    if hG : Nonempty α then
      obtain ⟨M, hM, _⟩ := h (hG.some)
      exact ⟨M, hM⟩
    else
      refine ⟨∅, ⟨by simp [IsMatching_iff, not_nonempty_iff.mp hG], fun M' hM' ↦ ?_⟩⟩
      have : M' = ∅ := by
        ext e; constructor; { intro he }; { exact (not_nonempty_iff.mp hG ⟨(hM'.subset he).1⟩).elim }; { intro h; exact h.elim }
      simp [this]
  refine ⟨M, hM.toIsMatching, fun H hH ↦ ?_⟩
  have h_fc : ∀ x ∈ V(H), ∃ M', H.IsMaxMatching M' ∧ x ∉ V(H, M') := by
    intro x hx
    obtain ⟨M', hM', hxM'⟩ := h x
    exact ⟨M' ∩ E(H), ⟨hM'.toIsMatching.inter_restrict hH, fun M'' hM'' ↦ sorry⟩, by sorry⟩
  have h_miss : (V(H) \ V(G, M)).encard = 1 := sorry
  rwa [encard_eq_one_iff_exists_unique] at h_miss

end Graph

have hmax : ∃ M, G.IsMaxMatching M := by
    if hV : ∃ x, x ∈ V(G) then
      obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := hV
      obtain ⟨M, hM, -⟩ := h x
      exact ⟨M, hM⟩
    else
      use ∅
      constructor
      · constructor
        · intro e he; exact (hV ⟨_, G.v_mem_ground e he⟩).elim
        · simp
      · intro M' hM'; have : M' = ∅ := by (contrapose! hV; obtain ⟨e, he⟩ := nonempty_iff_ne_empty.mpr hM'; exact ⟨_, G.v_mem_ground e (hM'.subset he)⟩); simp [this]
  obtain ⟨M, hM⟩ := hmax
  refine ⟨M.toIsMatching, fun H hH ↦ ?_⟩
  have h_rk : G.matchingMatroid.eRk V(H) = V(H).encard - 1 := by
    obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := hH.nonempty
    if hnt : (V(H)).Nontrivial then
      rw [G.matchingMatroid.fooA hH.subset_ground hnt (fun a ha b hb hne ↦ hH.series_of_adj (matchingMatroid.seriesPair_of_adj h) a ha b hb hne)]
      simp only [add_comm, ENat.add_sub_cancel_right (by simp)]
    else
      simp only [not_nontrivial_iff] at hnt
      rw [encard_eq_one_iff_exists_unique.mpr ⟨x, hx, hnt⟩]; simp [hH.eRk_of_inessential h]
  have h_basis : (V(G, M) ∩ V(H)).encard = G.matchingMatroid.eRk V(H) := hM.encard_inter_isComp hH
  rw [← encard_eq_one_iff_exists_unique, ← Set.encard_diff_val_encard_inter hH.vertexSet_finite, 
      inter_comm, h_basis, h_rk, tsub_tsub_cancel_of_le (by simp [hH.nonempty.encard_pos])]

by_cases hV : V(G) = ∅
  · refine ⟨∅, ⟨by simp [hV], by simp⟩, fun H hH ↦ ?_⟩
    exact (hH.subset_vertexSet.trans hV.subset_empty).elim
  · obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ : V(G).Nonempty := Set.nonempty_iff_ne_empty.2 hV
    obtain ⟨M, hM, _⟩ := h x
    refine ⟨M, hM.toIsMatching, fun H hH ↦ ?_⟩
    have h1 : (V(H) \ V(G, M)).encard = 1 := sorry
    rwa [encard_eq_one_iff_exists_unique] at h1

obtain ⟨B, hB⟩ := G.matchingMatroid.exists_basis Set.univ
  obtain ⟨M, hM, hBM⟩ := hB.indep
  have hBVM : B = V(G, M) := hBM.antisymm' (hB.eq_of_subset_indep ⟨M, hM, subset_refl _⟩ hBM)
  refine ⟨M, hM, fun H hH ↦ ?_⟩
  rw [← hBVM, ← encard_eq_one_iff_exists_unique]
  have h_series : ∀ x ∈ V(H), ∀ y ∈ V(H), x ≠ y → G.matchingMatroid.Series x y :=
    fun x hx y hy hne ↦ hH.series_of_adj (matchingMatroid.seriesPair_of_adj h) hx hy hne
  have hrk := G.matchingMatroid.fooA hH.subset_ground hH.nonempty_vertexSet.nontrivial_of_inessential h_series
  have hBH : B ∩ V(H) = (G ↾ V(H)).matchingMatroid.basis_univ.choose := sorry
  sorry

obtain ⟨M, hM⟩ : ∃ M, G.IsMaxMatching M := by
    by_cases hne : Nonempty α
    · exact (h hne.some).left
    · use ∅; refine ⟨⟨by simp, by simp⟩, fun M' hM' ↦ by
        rw [encard_le_zero_iff, ← subset_empty_iff]; intro e he
        exact hne ⟨Classical.arbitrary α⟩⟩
  refine ⟨M, hM.toIsMatching, fun H hH ↦ ?_⟩
  have : (V(H) \ V(G, M)).encard = 1 := by
    sorry
  rwa [← encard_eq_one_iff_exists_unique]

obtain ⟨M, hM⟩ : ∃ M, G.IsMaxMatching M := by
    obtain ⟨x⟩ | hα := isEmpty_or_nonempty α
    · exact ⟨∅, ⟨⟨by simp, by simp⟩, fun M' hM' ↦ by
        have : β → False := fun e ↦ (hM'.subset e).elim; simp [Set.eq_empty_of_isEmpty] at *; simp [hM'.subset]⟩⟩
    · exact (h x).choose, (h x).choose_spec.1
  refine ⟨M, hM.toIsMatching, fun H hH ↦ ?_⟩
  let L := G.matchingMatroid
  have h_series : ∀ x ∈ V(H), ∀ y ∈ V(H), L.Series x y := by
    intro x hx y hy
    obtain ⟨P, hP⟩ := hH.connected x hx y hy
    induction P with
    | nil u => exact Matroid.Series.refl (hH.subset_ground hx)
    | cons u e w ih =>
      obtain ⟨hu, he, hw⟩ := cons_isPath_iff.mp hP
      exact (matchingMatroid.seriesPair_of_adj h (Adj.of_isLink he)).trans (ih hw.1 (hH.subset_ground_edge he.right_mem))
  have h_no_coloop : ∀ x ∈ V(H), ¬ L.IsColoop x := fun x hx ↦ matchingMatroid.noColoop h (hH.subset_ground hx)
  have h_basis : L.IsBasis V(G, M) := by
    refine ⟨⟨M, hM.toIsMatching, subset_refl _⟩, fun S hS hMS ↦ ?_⟩
    obtain ⟨M', hM', hSM'⟩ := hS
    exact hMS.antisymm (hM.max M' hM' |>.trans_eq (hM.encard.symm) |> encard_le_encard_iff_eq (V(G, M).finite_toSet) |>.mp (encard_le_encard hSM'))
  have h_miss : (V(H) \ V(G, M)).encard = 1 := by
    -- Every basis of a matroid with a series class S and no coloops misses exactly one element of S.
    sorry
  rwa [encard_eq_one_iff_existsUnique, ← mem_diff] at h_miss

obtain ⟨M, hM⟩ : ∃ M, G.IsMaxMatching M := by
    by_cases hne : ∃ x, x ∈ V(G)
    · obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := hne
      obtain ⟨M, hM, -⟩ := h x
      exact ⟨M, hM⟩
    · refine ⟨∅, { subset := by simp; intro e he; exfalso; apply hne; exact ⟨G.inc_left he⟩,
        disjoint := by simp, max := by intro M' hM'; have : M' = ∅ := by
          rw [← subset_empty_iff, eq_empty_iff_forall_not_mem]
          intro e he; apply hne; exact ⟨G.inc_left (hM'.subset he)⟩
        simp [this] }⟩
  refine ⟨M, hM.toIsMatching, fun H hH ↦ ?_⟩
  have h_basis : G.matchingMatroid.Basis V(G, M) V(G) := by
    rw [Matroid.basis_iff_indep_encard_max]
    · refine ⟨⟨M, hM.toIsMatching, subset_refl _⟩, ?_⟩
      intro I hI
      obtain ⟨M', hM', hIM'⟩ := hI
      rw [hM.encard, ← hM'.encard]
      exact (encard_le_encard_inc hIM').trans (hM'.degree_le_one.encard_V_le)
    · rfl
  have h_series : ∀ x ∈ V(H), ∀ y ∈ V(H), G.matchingMatroid.Series x y := by
    intro x hx y hy
    obtain ⟨P, hP⟩ := hH.2 x hx y hy
    induction P with
    | nil u => exact G.matchingMatroid.series_refl (H.V_subset_G hH hx)
    | cons u e P ih =>
      obtain ⟨hx, hy⟩ := hP.toIsPath.first_last_mem
      have hxy : G.Adj u P.first := ⟨e, hP.toIsPath.first_inc_edge⟩
      exact (matchingMatroid.seriesPair_of_adj h hxy).trans (ih (hP.tail) (hP.toIsPath.last_mem))
  have h_nc : ∀ x ∈ V(H), ¬ G.matchingMatroid.IsColoop x := fun x hx ↦ matchingMatroid.noColoop h (H.V_subset_G hH hx)
  have h_rk : G.matchingMatroid.eRk (V(H)) = V(H).encard - 1 := by
    obtain hHnt | hHsub := H.vertexSet.nontrivial_or_subsingleton
    · have h_foo := Matroid.fooA (H.V_subset_G hH) hHnt h_series
      rw [← Matroid.eRk_closure_eq, H.closure_vertexSet_eq_vertexSet hH, Matroid.eRk_closure_eq] at h_foo
      sorry -- Simplified but still needs rank calculation
    · obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := H.vertexSet_nonempty_of_isCompOf hH
      have : V(H) = {x} := hHsub.eq_singleton_of_mem hx
      simp [this, h_nc x hx]
  sorry

obtain ⟨M, hM⟩ : ∃ M, G.IsMaxMatching M := by
    obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ | hx := (exists_or_forall_not (· ∈ V(G)))
    · exact (h x).imp fun M hM ↦ hM.1
    · exact ⟨∅, IsMatching.isMaxMatching_of_vertex_subset (by simp) (by simpa)⟩
  exact ⟨hM.toIsMatching, fun H hH ↦ by
    obtain ⟨x, hxH⟩ := H.vertexSet_nonempty
    obtain ⟨Mx, hMx, hxMx⟩ := h x
    have h_series : ∀ a ∈ V(H), ∀ b ∈ V(H), a ≠ b → G.matchingMatroid.Series a b := sorry
    have h_card : (V(H) \ V(G, M)).encard = 1 := sorry
    rwa [← encard_eq_one_iff_existsUnique]⟩

obtain rfl | ⟨x₀, _⟩ := G.vertexSet.eq_empty_or_nonempty
  · use ∅; simp [isCompOf_iff, IsMatching_iff, vertexSet_empty, forall_false_iff]
  obtain ⟨M, hM, _⟩ := h x₀
  refine ⟨M, hM.toIsMatching, fun H hH ↦ ?_⟩
  have hM_H : H.IsMaxMatching (M ∩ E(H)) := by sorry
  have hH_fc : ∀ x ∈ V(H), H.inessential x := by sorry
  have h_unique : ∃! x, x ∈ V(H) ∧ x ∉ V(H, M ∩ E(H)) := by sorry
  convert h_unique; simp [V, restrict_edge, hH.subset_vertexSet]

have hM : ∃ M, G.IsMaxMatching M := by
    by_cases hα : Nonempty α
    · obtain ⟨M, hM, _⟩ := h hα.some; exact ⟨M, hM⟩
    · exact ⟨∅, { subset := fun e he ↦ (hα ⟨(G.edge_nonempty e (G.edges_subset_ground he)).some⟩).elim,
        disjoint := fun e f he hf _ ↦ (hα ⟨(G.edge_nonempty e (G.edges_subset_ground he)).some⟩).elim,
        max := fun M' hM' ↦ by
          have hMe : M' = ∅ := by
            ext e; refine ⟨fun he ↦ ?_, fun he ↦ he.elim⟩
            exact (hα ⟨(G.edge_nonempty e (hM'.subset he)).some⟩).elim
          rw [hMe, encard_empty]; exact zero_le _ }⟩
  obtain ⟨M, hM⟩ := hM
  refine ⟨M, hM.toIsMatching, fun H hH ↦ ?_⟩
  have h_basis : G.matchingMatroid.Basis V(G, M) := by
    rw [Matroid.basis_iff_indep_encard_eq_eRank]
    · refine ⟨⟨M, hM.toIsMatching, subset_refl _⟩, ?_⟩
      rw [hM.encard, matchingMatroid, matchingIndepMatroid]
      simp only [IndepMatroid.matroid_eRank, matchingIndepMatroid]
      have : (sSup {n | ∃ M, G.IsMatching M ∧ n = M.encard}) = ν(G) := rfl
      rw [this, ← hM.encard]
      exact (V(G, M).encard_eq_two_times_card_matching hM.toIsMatching).symm
    · rw [matchingMatroid, matchingIndepMatroid]; exact G.vertexSet_subset_ground
  have h_dual_basis : G.matchingMatroid.dual.Basis (V(G) \ V(G, M)) := h_basis.compl
  have h_rk : G.matchingMatroid.dual.eRk V(H) = 1 := by
    obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := hH.nonempty
    have h_no_loop : ∀ y ∈ V(H), ¬ G.matchingMatroid.dual.IsLoop y :=
      fun y hy ↦ matchingMatroid.noColoop h (hH.subset_vertexSet hy)
    obtain rfl | hnt := V(H).subsingleton_or_nontrivial
    · rw [encard_singleton] at hx; rw [hx, Matroid.eRk_singleton, if_neg (h_no_loop x hx.some_mem)]; rfl
    rw [← (h_no_loop x hx).eRk_eq, ← G.matchingMatroid.dual.eRk_closure_eq {x}]
    apply le_antisymm (G.matchingMatroid.dual.eRk_mono (fun y hy ↦ ?_))
    · apply G.matchingMatroid.dual.eRk_mono; simp [hx]
    obtain rfl | hxy := eq_or_ne y x
    · exact G.matchingMatroid.dual.subset_closure _ (by simp) (hH.subset_vertexSet hy)
    exact (hH.seriesPair_of_forall_inessential h x y hx hy).mem_closure
  have h_inter : (V(G) \ V(G, M)) ∩ V(H) = V(H) \ V(G, M) := by
    ext x; simp; intro hx; exact hH.subset_vertexSet hx
  rw [encard_eq_one_iff_unique, ← h_rk, ← h_inter, h_dual_basis.encard_inter_eq_eRk_of_subset hH.subset_vertexSet]

obtain ⟨B, hB⟩ := G.matchingMatroid.exists_isBasis
  obtain ⟨M, hM, hBM⟩ := hB.indep
  use M, hM
  intro H hH
  rw [← hB.eq_of_subset_indep (G.matchingIndepMatroid.indep_iff.mpr ⟨M, hM, Subset.rfl⟩) hBM]
  rw [← encard_eq_one_iff_existsUnique, ← hB.eRk_dual_eq_encard_inter hH.subset_vertexSet]
  have h_rk : G.matchingMatroid.dual.eRk V(H) = 1 := by
    obtain hV | hV := V(H).subsingleton_or_nontrivial
    · have ⟨x, hx⟩ := hH.nonempty
      rw [hV.eq_singleton_of_mem hx, Matroid.eRk_singleton_dual]
      exact (G.matchingMatroid.noColoop h hx).inessential_rk
    · have h_ser : ∀ x ∈ V(H), ∀ y ∈ V(H), x ≠ y → G.matchingMatroid.Series x y := by
        intro x hx y hy hne
        obtain ⟨P, hP⟩ := hH.exists_isPath hx hy
        exact hP.series_of_forall_adj (fun _ _ ↦ G.matchingMatroid.seriesPair_of_adj h)
      rw [G.matchingMatroid.eRk_dual_add_eRank _ hH.subset_vertexSet, Matroid.fooA hH.subset_vertexSet hV h_ser]
      simp
  exact h_rk

obtain ⟨x0, -⟩ | hG := (Set.univ : Set α).eq_empty_or_nonempty.symm
  · obtain ⟨M, hM, -⟩ := h x0
    refine ⟨M, hM.toIsMatching, fun H hH ↦ ?_⟩
    have h_card : (V(H) \ V(G, M)).encard = 1 := by
      have hS : ∀ u ∈ V(H), ∀ v ∈ V(H), u ≠ v → G.matchingMatroid.Series u v :=
        fun u hu v hv hne ↦ matchingMatroid.seriesPair_of_adj h (hH.adj_of_mem hu hv hne)
      have h_rk : G.matchingMatroid.eRk (V(H)) = V(H).encard - 1 := by
        obtain h_nt | h_1 := V(H).nontrivial_or_subsingleton
        · exact Matroid.fooA hH.subset_V h_nt (fun u hu v hv hne ↦ h_series u hu v hv hne)
        · rw [h_1.encard_le_one.encard_eq_one_of_nonempty hH.nonempty, Nat.cast_one, sub_self,
            G.matchingMatroid.eRk_eq_zero_of_loop (hH.is_loop_of_subsingleton h_1)]
      have h_basis : G.matchingMatroid.IsBasis (V(G, M)) := by
        rw [hM.encard, ← matchingMatroid_rank_eq_2nu, ← matchingMatroid_basis_iff_isMatchable_and_max_size]
        exact ⟨⟨M, hM.toIsMatching, subset_rfl⟩, hM.encard_v⟩
      rw [← h_basis.inter_eRk_of_direct_sum_component hH.is_matroid_component, h_rk]
      exact (V(H).encard_diff_basis_inter h_basis hH.subset_V).trans h_rk
    rwa [encard_eq_one_iff_exists_unique] at h_card
  · use ∅
    refine ⟨{ subset := by simp [vertexSet_empty_iff.1 hG.subset_empty], disjoint := by simp },
      fun H hH ↦ (hH.nonempty.not_disjoint (hG.subset_empty.trans (empty_subset _))).elim⟩

obtain ⟨B, hB⟩ := G.matchingMatroid.exists_isBasis
  obtain ⟨M, hM, hMB⟩ := hB.indep
  have hV : B = V(G, M) := hB.eq_of_subset hM.indep hMB
  refine ⟨M, hM, fun H hH ↦ ?_⟩
  rw [← hV, ← encard_eq_one_iff_singleton]
  have h_ser : ∀ x ∈ V(H), ∀ y ∈ V(H), x ≠ y → G.matchingMatroid.Series x y := by
    intro x y hx hy hxy
    obtain ⟨P, hP⟩ := hH.exists_path hx hy
    clear h hM hMB hV hB M B
    induction P with
    | nil u => exact (hxy rfl).elim
    | cons u e P ih =>
      obtain ⟨v, rfl | hne, hP⟩ := P.exists_eq_nil_or_nonempty
      · exact matchingMatroid.seriesPair_of_adj h hP.adj_first
      exact (matchingMatroid.seriesPair_of_adj h hP.adj_first).trans (ih hP.first_mem hP.last_mem hne hP.tail)
  by_cases hnt : (V(H) : Set α).Nontrivial
  · have hrk := G.matchingMatroid.fooA hH.subset_ground hnt (fun u hu v hv huv ↦ h_ser u hu v hv huv)
    have h_basis_H : (V(H) ∩ B).encard = G.matchingMatroid.eRk V(H) := hB.eRk_inter_V_H hH
    rw [Set.encard_diff_inter_of_subset hH.subset_ground, h_basis_H, ← G.matchingMatroid.eRk_closure_eq (V(G) \ V(H)), hrk]
    simp [G.matchingMatroid.eRk_closure_eq, hH.subset_ground, B.encard]
  rw [Set.not_nontrivial_iff_subsingleton] at hnt
  obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := hH.nonempty
  have hVH : V(H) = {x} := hnt.eq_singleton_of_mem hx
  rw [hVH, Set.diff_singleton_eq_self, Set.encard_singleton]
  intro hxB
  exact (matchingMatroid.noColoop h hx).not_loop (G.matchingMatroid.loop_of_not_mem_basis hB hxB)

have hM : ∃ M, G.IsMaxMatching M := by
    if hne : V(G).Nonempty then
      obtain ⟨M, hM, _⟩ := h hne.some
      exact ⟨M, hM⟩
    else
      refine ⟨∅, ⟨⟨fun e he ↦ (hne ⟨_, G.edge_subset_ground he.1⟩).elim,
        fun e f he ↦ (hne ⟨_, G.edge_subset_ground he.1⟩).elim⟩,
        fun M' hM' ↦ by
          have : M' = ∅ := by
            ext e; exact (hne ⟨_, G.edge_subset_ground (hM'.subset e).1⟩).elim
          rw [this, encard_empty]⟩⟩
  obtain ⟨M, hM⟩ := hM
  refine ⟨M, hM.toIsMatching, fun H hH ↦ ?_⟩
  have hS : (V(H) \ V(G, M)).encard = 1 := by
    sorry
  rwa [encard_eq_one_iff_exists_unique] at hS

obtain hV | hV := G.V.eq_empty_or_nonempty
  · use ∅; simp [isMatching_iff, hV, IsCompOf_iff]
  obtain ⟨M, hM, _⟩ := h hV.some
  refine ⟨M, hM.toIsMatching, fun H hH ↦ ?_⟩
  have : (H.vertexSet \ V(G, M)).encard = 1 := sorry
  rwa [encard_eq_one_iff_exists_unique] at this

obtain ⟨M, hM, _⟩ := h (Classical.epsilon (fun _ ↦ True))
  refine ⟨M, hM.toIsMatching, fun H hH ↦ ?_⟩
  have h_no_col : ∀ x ∈ V(H), ¬ G.matchingMatroid.IsColoop x := fun x hx ↦ matchingMatroid.noColoop h x
  have h_ser : (V(H) : Set α).Nontrivial → ∀ a ∈ V(H), ∀ b ∈ V(H), a ≠ b → G.matchingMatroid.Series a b :=
    fun hnt a ha b hb hne ↦ hH.series_of_adj (matchingMatroid.seriesPair_of_adj h) a ha b hb hne
  exact hH.existsUnique_not_mem_matching h h_no_col h_ser hM

by_cases hG : (V(G) : Set α).Nonempty
  · obtain ⟨M, hM, -⟩ := h hG.some
    refine ⟨M, hM.toIsMatching, fun H hH ↦ ?_⟩
    sorry
  · refine ⟨∅, ⟨by sorry, by sorry⟩, fun H hH ↦ ?_⟩
    exact (hG ⟨hH.nonempty.some, hH.subset_vertexSet hH.nonempty.some_mem⟩).elim
